title: 11 natural solutions: herbal tinctures for diabetics with low blood pressure
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures have been used to help alleviate symptoms of low blood pressure due to its ability to stimulate the nervous system and increase heart rate. The tincture is rich in constituents such as alkylamides, phenolic acids, and glycoproteins, which have been shown to have a stimulating effect on the body.
